summary_en: 25,000,000 shares (1.0% of outstanding), ¥10.0B upper limit, trust-based open-market acquisition from May 18 to Aug 31, 2026. Cancellation of all acquired shares planned for Sep 24, 2026. Execution under total shareholder return target of ≥50% payout ratio, balancing capital adequacy, growth investment, and progressive dividend.
title_en: Notice regarding determination of matters concerning acquisition of treasury shares and determination of matters concerning cancellation of treasury shares
translation_en_brief:
Mizuho Financial Group announced on 15 May 2026 that its board has resolved to acquire up to 25 million treasury shares (1.0% of shares outstanding as of 31 March 2026) for up to ¥10.0 billion via trust-based open-market purchase. The acquisition window runs from 18 May 2026 to 31 August 2026. The company intends to cancel all acquired shares on 24 September 2026.

The buyback is part of the company's capital allocation policy balancing capital adequacy, growth investment, and enhanced shareholder returns. The board's decision reflects a total shareholder return target of at least 50% payout ratio, implemented through progressive per-share dividend increases and opportunistic treasury share acquisitions, with consideration given to financial performance, capital position, share price level, and growth investment opportunities.
